page: Amazon Web Services r8id.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 64 vCPUs and 32 physical cores running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is integrated directly via 3800 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes, and the network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 30 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core and memory performance. The instance achieved top-tier scores in Geekbench single-core and multi-core tests, as well as in image processing, text processing, and software compilation. Memory bandwidth tests show strong read-only performance, reaching 5121.18 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 191.69 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. The processor's support for Advanced Matrix Extensions and Advanced Vector Extensions contributes to top-tier prompt processing speeds in LLM inference benchmarks.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and integrated high-speed NVMe local storage, the r8id.16xlarge offers a resource-dense profile for data-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale database operations, in-memory caching systems like Redis, and memory-bound data processing pipelines. The inclusion of local NVMe SSDs eliminates the need for external network-attached storage for high-IOPS workloads, though users must manage the ephemeral nature of instance store volumes.
description: Amazon Web Services r8id.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 64 vCPUs and 512.0 GB of DDR5 memory. Operating at 3.9 GHz, the dedicated CPU architecture includes 32 physical cores and a 480 MB L3 cache. The instance features 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows top-tier performance in Geekbench multi-core tests, software compilation, and static web serving. The hardware supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX, which drive strong performance in LLM inference and cryptographic operations. With its high memory density and fast local storage, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large databases, Redis deployments, and high-throughput data processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8id.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB DDR5 RAM, and 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier performance for databases and memory-bound workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8id.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB DDR5 RAM, and 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86 server featuring high-speed DDR5 RAM, local NVMe SSD storage, and advanced matrix acceleration for demanding data workloads.
bullet_points: 64 vCPUs and 512.0 GB of high-speed 7 GHz DDR5 memory
3800 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage
Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 3.9 GHz clock speed and 480 MB L3 cache
Top-tier performance in Geekbench, software compilation, and static web serving
Hardware-accelerated cryptography and matrix operations via Intel AMX and AVX-512
Optimized for large databases, in-memory caches, and high-throughput data processing
